manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are participating in a collaborative guessing game.
The goal is to find out whether this grid and another picture only I can see, are the same.
Please describe your grid first. Then, I will provide my description and we can ask each other questions about the grids to figure out whether they are the same. Now start your short grid description with "DESCRIPTION:" followed by the description. Do not add anything else. This is your grid:
X ▢ ▢ ▢ X
▢ X ▢ X ▢
▢ ▢ X ▢ ▢
▢ X ▢ X ▢
X ▢ ▢ ▢ X

message.content: no extra.DESCRIPTION: A 5 × 5 grid. Row 1: X in the first and fifth cells, blanks (▢) in the middle three. Row 2: X in the second and fourth cells, blanks elsewhere. Row 3: X in the central third cell, blanks elsewhere. Row 4: same as row 2 (X in the second and fourth cells). Row 5: same as row 1 (X in the first and fifth cells).
message.reasoning: We need to respond with description only, starting with "DESCRIPTION:" then description, no extra text. Provide short grid description. Probably describe pattern. So "DESCRIPTION: a 5x5 grid ...". Ensure

reasoning_details.text: We need to respond with description only, starting with "DESCRIPTION:" then description, no extra text. Provide short grid description. Probably describe pattern. So "DESCRIPTION: a 5x5 grid ...". Ensure
